docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANTIAGO, ARNALDO AS TO DEFENDANT BALZOMO, MARILEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, ARNALDO
REMARK:NOTICE OF HEARING OF JULY 19, 2017 AT 1:30 PM. MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALZOMO, MARILEE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, ARNALDO AS TO DEFENDANT BALZOMO, MARILEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAITNIFF ARNALDO SANTIAGO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARILEE BALZOMO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, ARNALDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BALZOMO, MARILEE THE TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS (CCP 339) FOR AN ORAL CONTRACT HAS RUN ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
